description: Learn essential chopping techniques for vegetables and fruits.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: onions, carrots, and bell peppers.
Use a sharp knife and cutting board for safety.
Demonstrate the claw grip for holding food while chopping.
Chop the onions into small pieces.
Chop the carrots into thin rounds.
Chop the bell peppers into strips.

safety_tips: Always use a sharp knife to prevent slipping.
Keep your fingers tucked in while chopping.
Be cautious of the knife's edge.
